name: ios-app-v1
description: SwiftUI iOS app template with SwiftPM modules, Xcode project wrapper, Nix flake, Taskfile, simulator checks, and iOS archive/export helpers
author: tacogips

APP_DESCRIPTION.description: Short project description used in README and docs.

APP_DISPLAY_NAME.description: Human-readable app name shown in documentation.

DEVELOPMENT_TEAM.description: Apple Developer Team ID for signed device/archive builds.

IOS_APP_MAIN_TYPE.description: Swift @main App type. Must be a valid Swift identifier.

IOS_APP_TARGET.description: Xcode iOS app target name. Must be a valid Swift identifier.

IOS_FEATURE_TARGET.description: SwiftPM feature/UI library target name. Must be a valid Swift identifier.

IOS_PACKAGE_PLATFORM_VERSION.description: SwiftPM iOS platform enum suffix, for example 17 for .iOS(.v17).

ORGANIZATION_NAME.description: Organization name used in Xcode metadata.

PROJECT_NAME.description: Swift package/project name. Defaults to the output directory name.
